diffs.diff:
--- a/inspect_env.py
+++ b/inspect_env.py
@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+import os, sys, json, numpy as np, h5py

+from VLABench.envs import load_env

+

+# ---- Env observation format ----

+env = load_env("add_condiment")

+np.random.seed(0)

+env.reset()

+obs = env.get_observation(require_pcd=False)

+print("ee_state:", obs["ee_state"])

+print("ee_state shape:", obs["ee_state"].shape, "dtype:", obs["ee_state"].dtype)

+print("instruction:", obs["instruction"])

+print("action_spec shape:", env.action_spec().shape)

+print("action_spec min:", env.action_spec().minimum)

+print("action_spec max:", env.action_spec().maximum)

+

+# ---- Training data action stats ----

+h5_path = "/data/vlabench_train/train/task_000/episode_000000.hdf5"

+with h5py.File(h5_path, "r") as f:

+    actions = f["action"][:]

+    state = f["observation/state"][:]

+    print("\naction shape:", actions.shape)

+    print("action min :", actions.min(axis=0))

+    print("action max :", actions.max(axis=0))

+    print("action mean:", actions.mean(axis=0))

+    print("action std :", actions.std(axis=0))

+    print("state shape:", state.shape)

+    print("state min :", state.min(axis=0))

+    print("state max :", state.max(axis=0))
